query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `skillUsageLog` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `skillId` int NOT NULL,
  `skillName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `skillType` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `contextType` enum('chat','search','itinerary','content','classification') NOT NULL,
  `contextId` varchar(100),
  `inputText` text,
  `matchedKeywords` text,
  `outputResult` text,
  `userId` int,
  `sessionId` varchar(100),
  `wasSuccessful` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `errorMessage` text,
  `userFeedback` enum('positive','negative','none') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'none',
  `feedbackComment` text,
  `feedbackAt` timestamp,
  `ledToConversion` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `conversionType` enum('booking','inquiry','favorite','share','none') DEFAULT 'none',
  `conversionId` int,
  `conversionAt` timestamp,
  `processingTimeMs` int,
  `triggeredAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
